body:
Felix — good to finally have a reason to connect directly. I've been following [Accel](people/felix-adler)'s recent moves in the climate infrastructure space with a lot of interest, particularly the Greenpeak round you led last quarter. At [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital), we're seeing a meaningful uptick in deal flow at the seed stage for grid-edge AI applications, and I suspect our pipelines are starting to overlap in interesting ways. I'd love to find a time to compare notes — even a 30-minute call would be worthwhile to figure out where we might be complementary rather than stepping on each other. Would any slot work for you in the next couple of weeks?

Amara
